FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this
NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found
INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE: Your balance is too low. Please add funds and try again
RATE_LIMIT: Rate limit reached. Wait {retryAfter} seconds before trying again
MODEL_NOT_OPEN: Model permission is not activated. Go to https://console.volcengine.com/ark/region:ark+cn-beijing/openManagement?LLM=%7B%7D&advancedActiveKey=model and click "Activate all models" in the top-right of Model Management
MODEL_NOT_REGISTERED: Model not found. Please register it in your configuration first
MODEL_NOT_CONFIGURED: No model set up yet. Visit Settings to add the appropriate model type.
QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Your quota has been exhausted. Please try again later
GENERATION_FAILED: Generation task failed. Please try again
GENERATION_TIMEOUT: The generation request timed out. Please resubmit
MISSING_CONFIG: Please complete your model configuration before proceeding
INTERNAL_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again shortly
NETWORK_ERROR: Connection error. Please verify your network settings
EMPTY_RESPONSE: The model returned no usable output. Please try again later
EXTERNAL_ERROR: A third-party service is currently unavailable. Please retry later
NO_RESULT: No result available for this task
